body: This PR introduces output capabilities for conformal cubed sphere fields, specifically support for output writers. Functionality for checkpointing and field time series will be introduced in a future PR.
title: Add output functionality for conformal cubed sphere fields

body: This PR introduces checkpointing support for conformal cubed sphere fields. Specifically, it enables initializing simulations from previously saved checkpoints or output files by reading the stored field data.
title: Add checkpointing support for conformal cubed sphere fields

body: I think we must be missing a test or two for this bug to have persisted
title: Don't initialize callback every time_step

body: constant fields do not have a grid or a size, so they cannot be saved like an abstract array. This PR adds a `saveproperty!` method specific to saving down constant fields
title: Fix saveproperty! for a `ConstantField`
